description: A guest reports a large soda spill in a main concourse, creating a slip hazard.

nodes.task_description: Log the report and the exact location of the spill.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a new housekeeping request with the location.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the nearest available housekeeping crew member to the location.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent assigns the task to a specific cleaner.

nodes.task_description: Instruct a nearby usher or security guard to stand by the spill to warn guests until housekeeping arrives.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent dispatches another staff member to secure the area.
